steps.title: Track ice in both events
steps.content: The text says the sandal was preserved for centuries by surrounding ice. It also says a particularly warm summer melted the ice and revealed the sandal to a mountaineer.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported claims
steps.content: B overstates the Roman comparison as evidence of imperial influence. C is unsupported because a mountaineer found the sandal. D reverses the preservation logic; ice protected the sandal rather than threatening it. The answer is A.
